title: oldenlandia dimorpha
intro: Oldenlandia dimorpha, also known as the two-colored oldenlandia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia dimorpha include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of gastroenteritis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
